title: Fed communication remains a key market driver
summary: Markets continue to monitor Federal Reserve communication as monetary policy expectations remain central to cross-asset sentiment.

title: Inflation data influences rate expectations
summary: Recent inflation data may affect market expectations for the path of monetary policy and real yields.

title: US yields remain under close watch
summary: US yield moves remain a key driver for equity valuation, growth assets and broader risk appetite.

title: Oil prices remain relevant for inflation pressure
summary: Energy prices continue to be monitored as a potential source of inflation pressure and cross-asset volatility.

title: Geopolitical risk remains a source of market uncertainty
summary: Geopolitical developments may affect energy markets, risk sentiment and safe-haven demand.

title: Big Tech earnings remain important for equity sentiment
summary: Large technology earnings continue to influence Nasdaq momentum and broader growth sentiment.

title: Risk sentiment remains broadly constructive
summary: Cross-asset moves suggest that investors continue to monitor the balance between equity momentum, rates pressure and dollar strength.

title: Dollar moves remain important for cross-asset risk
summary: Dollar strength or weakness can affect commodities, global equities and foreign earnings translation.
